# Robbie Torres

> Technical Program Manager and digital services consultant based in Oakland, CA. 10+ years bridging business and technical teams across e-commerce, platform ops, and data analytics.

## About

Robbie Torres is a Technical Program Manager based in Oakland, California. He has over 10 years of experience in web development, e-commerce platform operations, and data analytics. He has managed web operations for 30+ websites, led a $20M e-commerce platform migration, and built production applications on Cloudflare Workers.

## Digital Services

Robbie offers white-label digital services for small businesses in Oakland and the Bay Area:

- Web Design & Development: website redesigns, landing pages, hosting, maintenance, accessibility (WCAG)
- Search & Visibility: SEO, keyword optimization, Google Business Profile, Google Ads, local SEO
- Email & Conversion: email marketing, A/B testing, conversion optimization
- Analytics & Reporting: Google Analytics 4 setup, Looker Studio dashboards, performance tracking
- Strategy & Implementation: digital strategy, technology audits, platform migrations, vendor coordination

## Contact

- Email: hello@robbietorres.info
- Website: https://robbietorres.info
- Services: https://robbietorres.info/services/
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/robbietorres
- Location: Oakland, CA

## Experience Highlights

- Built custom Digital Asset Management platform on Cloudflare Workers, replacing $30K+/year solutions at ~$600/year
- Led $20M e-commerce platform migration across 6 brands
- Directed technical operations for 30+ e-commerce websites
- Reduced page load times by up to 80%
- Built Black Friday/Cyber Monday infrastructure supporting $245K+ in sales
- BFA in Graphic Design from Cal Poly Pomona
